changeSet.author: yourname
changeSet.sql: CREATE KEYSPACE IF NOT EXISTS note_keyspace WITH REPLICATION = { 'class': 'SimpleStrategy', 'replication_factor': 1 };

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notes ( country text, topic_id bigint, id bigint, content text, created_at timestamp, updated_at timestamp, PRIMARY KEY ((country), topic_id, id) ) WITH CLUSTERING ORDER BY (topic_id ASC, id ASC) AND comment = 'Stores user notes organized by country and topic';
